content.text: Now the real end-to-end proof: run the clean clone's backend and frontend together, with no `.env.local`, exactly as a reviewer would:

input.command:
cd "$CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/final/repo/project-b-ai-assisted/backend"
nohup ./venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --log-level warning > "$CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/f-api.log" 2>&1 &
cd ../frontend && nohup npm run start -- --port 3000 > "$CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/f-web.log" 2>&1 &
sleep 6
cd "$CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/final/repo/project-b-ai-assisted/backend"
echo "=== seed_key.py, exactly as SETUP.md documents ==="
KEY=$(./venv/bin/python seed_key.py "my-laptop" | sed -n '4p' | tr -d ' ')
echo "  key: ${KEY:0:10}…"
echo "=== api + web up? ==="
curl -s localhost:8000/api/health; curl -s -o /dev/null -w ' web=%{http_code}\n' localhost:3000
echo "=== full user journey via API ==="
printf '  create:    '; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' -X POST localhost:8000/api/links -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://www.anthropic.com"}'
CODE=$(curl -s -X POST localhost:8000/api/links -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/news"}' | ./venv/bin/python -c 'import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["code"])')
printf '  duplicate: '; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} (expect 200)\n' -X POST localhost:8000/api/links -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/news"}'
printf '  redirect:  '; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} -> %{redirect_url}\n' localhost:8000/$CODE
printf '  bad url:   '; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} (expect 422)\n' -X POST localhost:8000/api/links -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"javascript:alert(1)"}'
printf '  no auth:   '; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} (expect 401)\n' -X POST localhost:8000/api/links -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://x.com"}'
printf '  missing:   '; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} (expect 404)\n' localhost:8000/zzzzzz
printf '  stats:     '; curl -s localhost:8000/api/links/$CODE/stats -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" | ./venv/bin/python -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(f"click_count={d[\"click_count\"]}")'
echo "=== frontend served without .env.local ==="
curl -s localhost:3000 | grep -o 'Shortener' | head -1
pkill -f "uvicorn main:app --port 8000"; pkill -f "next start"; sleep 1; echo "=== stopped ==="

content.text: Everything green — the only failure was my own shell quoting in the stats probe. Note `redirect: 307` and the frontend rendering **without** `.env.local`, confirming the fix. Re-checking stats:

input.command:
cd "$CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/final/repo/project-b-ai-assisted/backend"
nohup ./venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --log-level warning > /dev/null 2>&1 &
sleep 4
KEY=$(./venv/bin/python seed_key.py "stats-check" | sed -n '4p' | tr -d ' ')
CODE=$(curl -s -X POST localhost:8000/api/links -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://example.com/counted"}' | ./venv/bin/python -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)['code'])")
for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl -s -o /dev/null localhost:8000/$CODE; done
echo "5 redirects issued; stats says:"
curl -s localhost:8000/api/links/$CODE/stats -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" | ./venv/bin/python -m json.tool
echo "=== expired link returns 410? ==="
CODE2=$(curl -s -X POST localhost:8000/api/links -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://example.com/short-lived","expires_in_days":1}' | ./venv/bin/python -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)['code'])")
./venv/bin/python -c "
import crud, models
from database import SessionLocal
from datetime import timedelta
db = SessionLocal()
l = crud.get_link_by_code(db, '$CODE2')
l.expires_at = models.utcnow() - timedelta(days=1)
db.commit(); db.close()"
curl -s -o /dev/null -w '  %{http_code} (expect 410, and distinct from the 404 above)\n' localhost:8000/$CODE2
pkill -f "uvicorn main:app --port 8000"; sleep 1; echo stopped
